summary: Review-archive producer, checked-in baseline, and shared schema sample now stay aligned under a targeted generated-contract parity guard.

observations.problem: The review archive producer, checked-in review archive report, artifact freshness baseline, and shared schema sample needed a narrow parity guard dedicated to this producer when its contract changes again.
observations.why_it_matters: Without an explicit parity guard, future review-archive contract changes can drift from the checked-in baseline report or shared schema samples until a human notices during later validation.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a targeted generated-contract parity check that requires the checked-in baseline report and shared schema sample to stay in sync with the canonical review-archive producer contract.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-04-28: generated-report contracts now compare the checked-in review archive baseline against the shared review_archive schema sample so future producer contract edits fail fast unless both are refreshed together.
